title: The Future of Web Development with AI
excerpt: Exploring how generative AI and modern tooling are reshaping the landscape of frontend and backend development.
content:
## Introduction

Artificial Intelligence is no longer just a buzzword; it's a fundamental shift in how we approach problem-solving in web development...

### The Rise of Copilots

Developers are increasingly relying on AI assistants...
